name: Basil Cinnamon Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 1 cup packed opal basil leaves (including any blossoms), rinsed and spun dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Bruise the basil leaves and blossoms with a wooden spoon.
2. Add the cinnamon to the jar.
3. Pour in the white wine vinegar.
4. Cover the jar tightly and let steep for 4 days to 2 weeks in a cool, dark place.
5. Strain the mixture through a fine sieve into clean glass jars.
6. Add the basil sprigs to each jar.
7. Seal the jars with lids.
WARNING: Keep for several months. (Garnishes and other solids left in the jar may discolor or break down.)
